case_title: MARIAN SCHOCK ET AL VS. ABIGAIL GLYNN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-30-2020 CONTINUED TO NOV-04-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-01-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ABIGAIL GLYNN AND DAVIS REALTY CO., INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON DECEMBER 18, 2020 AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HEARS ALL MATTERS ARISING OUT OF THE ACQUISITION OF REAL PROPERTY PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ABIGAIL GLYNN, DAVIS REALTY CO., INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT, BOTH WRITTEN AND ORAL, AND TO ATTACH A COPY OF THE WRITTEN CONTRACT. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACT SUPPORTING CONTENTION THAT MISREPRESENTATIONS REGARDING ROTHCHILD WERE MADE WITH INTENTION OF CAUSING, OR RECKLESS DISREGARD OF THE PROBABILITY OF CAUSING, EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: (Court call)
Tracy Forbath,619.685.5507 of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith for Defendants Abigal Glynn and Davis Realty.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court asks Ms. Forbath if she complied with the tentative ruling rule and gave notice to the Plaintiff that she would be contesting the tentative ruling. Ms. Forbath stated that notice was given at 4:08 pm. The Court informs counsel that her notice was not timely and therefore improper. The Court will not hear any argument.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ABIGAIL GLYNN, DAVIS REALTY CO., INC. MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: (Court call)
Tracy Forbath,619.685.5507 of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith for Defendants Abigal Glynn and Davis Realty.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court asks Ms. Forbath if she complied with the tentative ruling rule and gave notice to the Plaintiff that she would be contesting the tentative ruling. Ms. Forbath stated that notice was given at 4:08 pm. The Court informs counsel that her notice was not timely and therefore improper. The Court will not hear any argument.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ABIGAIL GLYNN, DAVIS REALTY CO., INC. DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained to the cause of action for breach of contract for Plaintiff to allege terms of the contract, both written and oral, and to attach a copy of the written contract. Demurrer is sustained to the cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress for Plaintiff to allege fact supporting contention that misrepresentations regarding Rothchild were made with intention of causing, or reckless disregard of the probability of causing, emotional distress. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
